1.title: Goal
1.content: Introduce competitive programming to new students and help programming students understand complex data structures and algorithms.

2.title: Motivation
2.content: Many students are interested in competitive programming, but do not know where to start.

3.title: The Team
3.content: . | Jon Ayuco — Website | Pedro Marcet — Database | Ivan Mariott — Manim+ Visualizer | .

7.title: Competitive Programming Primer
7.content: Welcome to the website! . If you wish to tackle ICPC contest problems from North America, explore the regional map below. If you want to practice curated problems from Kattis or browse the full repository, the Problem Repository is available in the left navigation.

8.title: Explore Problems by North America Region
8.content: Your browser does not support SVG maps. Select a North America region to load matching problems from Supabase.

9.title: Select a region
9.content: Click a region on the map to view problems.
